case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. KIMBERLY Y. SOLARES

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-02-2022 CONTINUED TO NOV-01-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOLARES, KIMBERLY Y. $1,999.04 PRINCIPAL, $248.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,247.04, SEE SCANNED DOC
